description: Unlock ladder and vesting rules governing station access progression

vesting_rules.near_vest_description: NEAR-state claims vest at phi^-2 (0.382) of full payout until promoted to OK
rules: OK claims vest immediately at 100% of computed payout
NEAR claims vest at near_vest_ratio (0.382) of computed payout
NEAR claims may be promoted to OK to receive the remaining 0.618 of payout
AMBIG and VOID claims do not vest and receive zero payout
Vesting is computed at the time of CERTIFIED state transition
Promotion from NEAR to OK releases the unvested portion
Unvested NEAR payouts expire after 89 epochs if not promoted

level_computation.description: Player level is the highest Fibonacci unlock level for which all prerequisites are met

prerequisites.level_5: At least 1 SEALED Guild quest + 3 total SEALED quests
prerequisites.level_8: At least 1 SEALED Community quest + 5 total SEALED quests
prerequisites.level_13: At least 1 SEALED TempleRite quest + 8 total SEALED quests
prerequisites.level_21: At least 1 SEALED Storm quest + 13 total SEALED quests
prerequisites.level_34: At least 1 SEALED Publish quest + 21 total SEALED quests
prerequisites.level_55: At least 1 SEALED Seeding quest + 34 total SEALED quests
prerequisites.level_89: At least 1 SEALED Policy quest + 55 total SEALED quests

regression_protection.description: Players cannot lose unlock levels once achieved
rules: Ethics watchlist does not reduce unlock level but restricts quest class access
Rollback events do not affect player unlock levels
